title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY AGAWA, MUNICIPALITY OF BESAO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS AGAWA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5499; 109 OG No. 7, 821 (February 18, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10292, November 14, 2012 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY AGAWA, MUNICIPALITY OF BESAO, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO BE KNOWN AS AGAWA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and

House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress

assembled:

SECTION 1.

Establishment of a National

High School.

â There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department

of Education, a national high school in Barangay Agawa, Municipality of

Besao, Mountain Province to be known as Agawa National High School.

SEC. 2.

Appropriations.

â The

Secretary of

Education shall immediately include in the Departmentâs program the

operationalization of the Agawa National High School, the funding of

which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3.

Implementation.

â

The Secretary of Education

shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out

the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4.

Effectivity.

â

This Act shall take effect

fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE

ENRILE

President of the

Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE

JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives

was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on

December 13, 2011 and August 28, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

NOV 14 2012

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO

III

President of the

Philippines
